title.en: Ye Tian looked at the surrounding mountains and...

content.en:
"Come in!"

Ye Tian looked at the surrounding mountains and muttered.

This is only one of the ten thousand worlds in the ten thousand worlds, and this time only the sons of the ten other cosmic epochs entered the ten thousand worlds.

Therefore, the probability of encountering a Child of an Era in the Middle Thousand Worlds is very low.

"Those sons of the era are almost 100% able to enter the Great Thousand Worlds, and even the Heavenly Realm, so there is no need to look for them in the Middle Thousand Worlds, I will accumulate luck first, and it will be easier to find them directly in the Heavenly Realm!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Soon, Ye Tian met a galaxy-level, a galaxy-level of the Gama clan.

The Gama clan is just an ordinary cosmic clan, much weaker than the human race, and this galaxy-level is just an ordinary cosmic child, and his strength is not strong.

This Gama Clan Galaxy Level saw Ye Tian, and his face changed greatly.

Obviously, he recognized Ye Tian.

"I've seen the Allah of Wanfa, I admit defeat and beg Wanfa Allah don't kill me!!"

The Gamma galaxy begged for mercy.

"Okay, let's go!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Thank you Allah!"

The Gama Clan Galaxy level hurriedly thanked him.

After this Gama clan admitted defeat, part of his qi luck flew into Ye Tian's body and was swallowed by Ye Tian's qi luck.

In fact, defeating an enemy will definitely give you much less luck than killing an enemy.

But Ye Tian's purpose in entering here this time was not to kill these galaxy levels, no matter how much he killed, it was useless, and he couldn't really improve his strength.

As long as you accumulate enough luck, it is enough, and it does not affect the result.

Besides, if he really killed too many galaxy-level, after returning to the outside world, the masters behind those galaxy-level would deduce that he did it, and he would definitely be prejudiced against him and the human race.

Therefore, there is no need for him to do anything that offends the Supreme.

Next, Ye Tian encountered one galaxy level after another, most of the galaxy level took the initiative to beg for mercy when they met Ye Tian, and some of the galaxy level was a little inflated, thinking that they could fight with Ye Tian, and they were beaten very badly by Ye Tian, but they all left their lives.

Half a month passed quickly.

On this day, Ye Tian gathered a large amount of Qi Luck on his body, communicated the power of the Qi Luck Scroll and the Heavenly Dao Origin, and instantly left this Middle Thousand World and came to the Great Thousand World in the Ten Thousand Worlds.

At this time, there were almost no people who had entered the world, so he had to wait a few days.

Wait for the galaxy level of the great world to converge, and then decide a person with monstrous luck, and then enter the heavenly realm.

Basically, a vast world is only a few galaxies at most.

This kind of wasting another month of Ye Tian's time.

A month later, Ye Tian unfolded his invincible posture and defeated one star level after another.

There are many galaxy levels who don't know the plan this time, in order to be able to enter the heavenly realm, they united to defeat Ye Tian, but they were easily defeated by Ye Tian.

this day.

Ye Tian felt in his heart: "My luck has accumulated enough, and I can enter the heavenly realm!"

Without the slightest hesitation, he instantly entered the Heavenly Realm.

Ten Thousand Worlds, Heavenly Realm.

As soon as Ye Tian entered this world, he began to look for the traces of the son of the era.

With the strength of those sons of the era, maybe someone has already come to this heavenly realm, after all, those sons of the era must have killed all the way, and the speed of accumulating luck is much faster than Ye Tian's benevolent means.

"The top priority is to find one of the sons of the era, catch it, and interrogate it slowly!"

Ye Tian thought.

Immediately, he remembered what Kunwu Supreme had told him.

Kunwu Supreme asked him to find a weaker son of the era, and once he met a powerful son of the era, don't fight and entangle with him, and leave directly.

Ye Tian himself really wanted to fight with those sons of the era one by one, and even fight one-on-one.

But when you think about the importance of this plan, you can't be so arrogant.

"Let's go find a Child of the Epoch first!"

Ye Tian decided.

Swish!

He flew fast and unleashed his talent for copying, searching for the traces of the Children of Age.

......

Celestial, somewhere.

A figure emerged, and it was Ling Wu, one of the sons of the Ten Eras.

Ling Wu is a member of the Golden God Clan, and his combat effectiveness is very strong, even if he is placed among the sons of the era, he is not a weak person, and he is much stronger than the original Underworld.

At this time, Ling Wu's face was proud and proud.

"Hehe, the genius of this universe is really too weak, those galaxy-level even casual attacks can't withstand it, it's really waste. I really don't know why the Golden Light Heavenly Venerable Ancestor asked me to be so careful, in my opinion, the Ancestors and the Supremes of other Cosmic Epochs combined are enough to sweep away all the forces of the entire Cosmic Era!"

Ling Wu muttered.

He couldn't figure out why, he didn't dare to really question the Supremes, so he could only complain here.

Suddenly.

Ling Wu's face changed, and he felt a powerful aura and a sense of crisis.

"It's the son of another power era, isn't it?"

Ling Wu's gaze looked into the distance, only to see a figure slowly enlarge and appear in front of him.

"Ye Tian!"

Ling Wu recognized it.

After all, Ye Tian defeated Mingdong, and he can be regarded as a son of the era, and before coming in, the ancestors asked him to defend Ye Tian, and he naturally recognized it.

Ye Tian stared at Ling Wu and smiled.

"It's good luck to meet a Child of the Anch so soon!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

"Good luck, I said that you are too unlucky, you think that if you win the underworld, you can defeat me? hehe, the waste weakness of the underworld is too obvious, proficient in soul cultivation, and the physical body is a mess, you just restrained the underworld, but when you meet a son of the era like me, who is mainly physical, you are not worth mentioning at all!"

Ling Wu said.

"yes, then let's shoot!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Look for death!"

Ling Wu was enraged by Ye Tian's contemptuous demeanor and attacked towards Ye Tian.

Rumble!!!

The supreme fist mastery exploded, and it leaked invincible physical strength.

Obviously, Ling Wu's attainments in the flesh were very high.

Then.

Ye Tian also exhibited a supreme-level sword path mastery - a sword in the sky!

"Slash!"

The strongest sword slashed over, shattering all of Ling Wu's defenses with devastating power, even breaking through a superb defensive origin artifact on his body, and even piercing his body through a knife edge.

This blow, Ling Wu was seriously injured!

"How so??"

Ling Wu lay there extremely weak, unable to accept such a fact.

He lost, and was defeated with a single sword!

At this moment, Ye Tianyi grabbed Ling Wu, sealed it in the Void Mina Realm in his palm, and quickly left here.

There was a battle just now, and there is no guarantee that no other children of the era will rush over.

He didn't want to cause a sudden change!

Not long after, Ye Tian found a relatively desolate mountain range and opened up a temporary cave mansion.

"It's time to interrogate this guy!"

Ye Tian muttered.
